# Psalms 132

## Verses (18)

| # | Basic English Bible | Compare |
|---|---|---|
| [1](BBE.md#v1) | Lord, give thought to David, and to all his troubles; | [WEB](WEB.md#v1) · [KJV](KJV.md#v1) · [ASV](ASV.md#v1) |
| [2](BBE.md#v2) | How he made an oath to the Lord, and gave his word to the great God of Jacob, saying, | [WEB](WEB.md#v2) · [KJV](KJV.md#v2) · [ASV](ASV.md#v2) |
| [3](BBE.md#v3) | Truly, I will not come into my house, or go to my bed, | [WEB](WEB.md#v3) · [KJV](KJV.md#v3) · [ASV](ASV.md#v3) |
| [4](BBE.md#v4) | I will not give sleep to my eyes, or rest to my eyeballs, | [WEB](WEB.md#v4) · [KJV](KJV.md#v4) · [ASV](ASV.md#v4) |
| [5](BBE.md#v5) | Till I have got a place for the Lord, a resting-place for the great God of Jacob. | [WEB](WEB.md#v5) · [KJV](KJV.md#v5) · [ASV](ASV.md#v5) |
| [6](BBE.md#v6) | We had news of it at Ephrathah: we came to it in the fields of the wood. | [WEB](WEB.md#v6) · [KJV](KJV.md#v6) · [ASV](ASV.md#v6) |
| [7](BBE.md#v7) | Let us go into his tent; let us give worship at his feet. | [WEB](WEB.md#v7) · [KJV](KJV.md#v7) · [ASV](ASV.md#v7) |
| [8](BBE.md#v8) | Come back, O Lord, to your resting-place; you and the ark of your strength. | [WEB](WEB.md#v8) · [KJV](KJV.md#v8) · [ASV](ASV.md#v8) |
| [9](BBE.md#v9) | Let your priests be clothed with righteousness; and let your saints give cries of joy. | [WEB](WEB.md#v9) · [KJV](KJV.md#v9) · [ASV](ASV.md#v9) |
| [10](BBE.md#v10) | Because of your servant David, do not give up your king. | [WEB](WEB.md#v10) · [KJV](KJV.md#v10) · [ASV](ASV.md#v10) |
| [11](BBE.md#v11) | The Lord gave a true oath to David, which he will not take back, saying, I will give your kingdom to the fruit of your body. | [WEB](WEB.md#v11) · [KJV](KJV.md#v11) · [ASV](ASV.md#v11) |
| [12](BBE.md#v12) | If your children keep my word, and the teachings which I will give them, their children will be rulers of your kingdom for ever. | [WEB](WEB.md#v12) · [KJV](KJV.md#v12) · [ASV](ASV.md#v12) |
| [13](BBE.md#v13) | For the Lord's heart is on Zion, desiring it for his resting-place. | [WEB](WEB.md#v13) · [KJV](KJV.md#v13) · [ASV](ASV.md#v13) |
| [14](BBE.md#v14) | This is my rest for ever: here will I ever be; for this is my desire. | [WEB](WEB.md#v14) · [KJV](KJV.md#v14) · [ASV](ASV.md#v14) |
| [15](BBE.md#v15) | My blessing will be on her food; and her poor will be full of bread. | [WEB](WEB.md#v15) · [KJV](KJV.md#v15) · [ASV](ASV.md#v15) |
| [16](BBE.md#v16) | Her priests will be clothed with salvation; and her saints will give cries of joy. | [WEB](WEB.md#v16) · [KJV](KJV.md#v16) · [ASV](ASV.md#v16) |
| [17](BBE.md#v17) | There I will make the horn of David fertile: I have made ready a light for my king. | [WEB](WEB.md#v17) · [KJV](KJV.md#v17) · [ASV](ASV.md#v17) |
| [18](BBE.md#v18) | His haters will be clothed with shame; but I will make his crown shining. | [WEB](WEB.md#v18) · [KJV](KJV.md#v18) · [ASV](ASV.md#v18) |
